events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes overcurrent device selection and coordination work at rough-complete stage. The photos show installed work following the referenced detail, clearances, labels, supports, and terminations are in place, and the inspection card has no open correction notes. No component conditions are flagged. This appears to be a compliant installation.

References: NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C)
